flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lincoln Land Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lincoln Land Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (20.2% → 22.6%).
